name: antigravity-deck
description: Antigravity Deck — full-featured workspace dashboard for Antigravity (Windsurf) with conversation history, multi-workspace, and remote access

scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(!fs.existsSync('settings.json'))fs.copyFileSync('settings.sample.json','settings.json');console.log('✅ Setup complete! Run: npm run dev')"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n BE,FE -c cyan,magenta "node --watch server.js" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.tunnel: concurrently -n TUN-BE,TUN-FE -c green,yellow "npm run tunnel:be" "npm run tunnel:fe"
